full_text:
Kong Shang 孔尚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Shang (孔尚)was born in Lu. Great-great-grandfather of Kong Rong, who served Wei. Kong Shang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
